music.prompt: Lo-fi electronic background music, calm but modern, subtle beat, no vocals, 6 minutes, suitable for educational crypto explainer video

scenes.narration: ¿Sabías que hoy podés prestar, pedir prestado y ganar intereses con crypto, todo sin bancos ni papeles? Hoy te explico cómo funcionan las finanzas crypto.

subScenes.imagePrompt: Bitcoin and Ethereum icons appearing with glowing effect, no text
Stack of gold coins morphing into digital crypto coins
Question mark icon with crypto symbols around it, stickman thinking
Stickman pointing at crypto chart going up
Title text 'FINANZAS CRYPTO' in bold, crypto icons around

scenes.narration: Las finanzas crypto también se conocen como DeFi — Finanzas Descentralizadas. La idea es simple: reemplazar intermediarios como bancos con código que corre en una blockchain. Todo es público, transparente y cualquiera puede usarlo.

subScenes.imagePrompt: Bank building on left vs blockchain network nodes on right
Stickman at bank counter with papers being replaced by digital interface
Blockchain chain of blocks with data inside, glowing connections
Open book icon with 'público' label, magnifying glass with 'transparente' label
Stickman with laptop and globe icon, label 'cualquiera puede usarlo'
Bank manager vs code snippet comparison, DeFi removes middleman
World map with blockchain nodes connected globally
Three icons: lock (security), eye (transparency), hand (access)
Stickman smiling holding a phone showing DeFi app interface
Label 'DeFi' in center with icons around: lending, borrowing, trading
Transition arrow pointing right, 'Smart Contracts' text

scenes.narration: El motor de todo esto son los smart contracts. Son programas que se ejecutan automáticamente cuando se cumplen ciertas condiciones. Nadie los puede detener ni modificar una vez lanzados.

subScenes.imagePrompt: Engine icon with code lines coming out, label 'Smart Contracts'
Lines of code with colorful syntax highlighting
Domino effect: condition A triggers action B, automatic execution
Vending machine analogy: insert coin -> get product, like smart contract execution
Two stickmen signing a digital contract that auto-executes
Lock icon with 'nadie lo detiene' label, immutable code
Code deployed to blockchain, rocket launching, permanent storage
Ethereum logo with 'EVM' label, smart contract platform
Smart contract examples: lending, swapping, NFTs
Hands holding a digital contract, glowing effect
Cogs and gears forming a brain, symbolizing smart contract logic
Transition arrow, 'Préstamos' text appearing

scenes.narration: Por ejemplo: querés pedir un préstamo. En DeFi depositás crypto como garantía — generalmente 150% del valor del préstamo. A cambio recibís una stablecoin como USDC o DAI. Mientras pagues el interés, recuperás tu crypto.

subScenes.imagePrompt: Stickman holding ETH coins with question mark, thinking about borrowing
Stickman depositing ETH into a digital vault labeled 'colateral'
Scale showing 150% collateral ratio, ETH vs loan value
Stickman receiving USDC/DAI coins from the protocol, happy expression
Stablecoin icons: USDC and DAI with '$1' label, pegged to dollar
Calendar with interest payment dates, stickman paying on time
Vault opening, ETH returning to stickman after loan repaid
Flowchart: deposit -> borrow -> repay -> withdraw
Traditional bank loan vs DeFi loan comparison, no paperwork
Interest rate percentage going up and down, variable rates in DeFi
Stickman using borrowed stablecoins to trade and invest
'Liquidation' warning triangle, price chart dropping
Aave and Compound protocol logos as lending platform examples
Stickman managing multiple loans, dashboard interface
Summary icons: deposit, borrow, repay
Transition to next topic, 'Yield Farming' text with arrow
Coins stacking up with farming tool icon, liquidity pools intro
Pool of water with ETH and USDC coins floating, liquidity concept
Percentage symbols rising from the pool, earning yield
DEX interface showing liquidity pool (like Uniswap)

scenes.narration: Después están los liquidity pools. Vos depositás dos activos, por ejemplo ETH y USDC, en un pool. Cuando alguien intercambia entre esos tokens, paga una comisión. Esa comisión se reparte entre todos los que pusieron liquidez. Eso es yield farming.

subScenes.imagePrompt: Liquidity pool as a large container, ETH and USDC coins pouring in
Stickman depositing ETH and USDC into pool, receiving LP tokens
Two traders swapping tokens through the pool, arrows in and out
Fee icon with small coins dropping, '0.3% fee' label
Pool distributing fees back to LP providers, percentage increasing
Multiple interconnected pools, complex DeFi ecosystem
APR percentage going up, yield optimization strategies
Stickman moving funds between pools to chase best yield
'Impermanent Loss' warning, two diverging price arrows
Rewards dashboard showing earned fees, yield farmer checking returns
Third party protocols: Yearn, Beefy auto-compounding yields
Yield farming cycle: deposit -> earn -> compound -> earn more
Stickman with farming hat, holding a basket of tokens
Liquidity pool depth chart, how trades affect price
Three pool types: stable, volatile, weighted
Passive income: coins flowing while stickman sleeps
Transition to staking, 'Staking' text with lock icon
Summary of liquidity providing: deposit, earn fees, withdraw
'Staking' title card, coins inside a shield
Padlock with coins around it, staking rewards concept

scenes.narration: Otra forma de ganar es el staking. Bloqueás tus tokens en una red para ayudar a validar transacciones. A cambio, la red te paga recompensas. Es como tener un plazo fijo pero en crypto, con rendimientos que pueden ser del 5% al 20% anual.

subScenes.imagePrompt: Stickman locking tokens into a safe labeled 'Staking'
Blockchain validators at work, stickmen with checkmarks approving transactions
Proof of Stake vs Proof of Work comparison, energy efficient
Rewards flowing from network to staker, coins increasing
Calendar showing monthly rewards, passive income calendar
Bank fixed term 2% vs crypto staking 5-20% comparison, graphic bars
Ethereum 2.0 shield, Solana, Cardano logos as staking platforms
Locked padlock with 'locked period' label, unstaking timer
Stickman checking staking dashboard, balance growing
Compounding rewards: reinvesting staking rewards for more yield
'Validator node' icon, running a node vs pool staking
Slashing warning, penalty for validator misbehavior
Liquid staking: Lido/stETH, staked tokens still usable in DeFi
Summary icons: lock, validate, earn
Transition arrow, 'Riesgos' text, warning colors

scenes.narration: Pero no todo es color de rosa. Los riesgos existen: los smart contracts pueden tener bugs, los precios pueden caer y liquidar tu garantía, y hay estafas como los rug pulls. Nunca inviertas plata que no puedas perder.

subScenes.imagePrompt: Warning triangle icon centered, 'RIESGOS' bold text, red tones
Smart contract with a bug icon, cracked code, exploit risk
Hacker breaking into a smart contract, money flying away
Price chart crashing down, red candle sticks, liquidation happening
Stickman losing collateral, vault closing, liquidated warning
'Rug Pull' illustration, carpet being pulled, stickman falling
Fake project with 'SCAM' stamp, money disappearing
Government building with gavel, regulatory uncertainty, unclear laws
Impermanent loss: two tokens diverging in price, LP losing value
Stickman with binoculars, 'DYOR' label (Do Your Own Research)
Diversification: eggs in different baskets, risk management
'Start Small' piggy bank with tiny crypto coin
Audited vs non-audited projects, checkmark and X comparison
Stickman with hard hat, 'safety first', navigating DeFi carefully
Risk vs reward scale, balance concept in crypto investing
'Never invest more than you can lose' text, important reminder
Transition to closing, summary of risk tips
Checkmark list: audit, diversify, start small, DYOR
Stickman confidently moving forward, knowledge is power
Book icon, learning never stops, closing transition

scenes.narration: Las finanzas crypto están redefiniendo cómo manejamos el dinero. Si entendés cómo funcionan, podés aprovecharlas. Investigá, empezá con montos chicos, y nunca dejés tus claves en un exchange. Nos vemos en el próximo video.

subScenes.imagePrompt: Recap of all topics: DeFi, smart contracts, lending, yield farming, staking
Stickman understanding crypto finance, lightbulb above head
Research tools: magnifying glass, newspaper, charts, 'investigá' label
Small plant growing from a single coin, 'start small' concept
Keys in safe hands, 'not your keys not your crypto' message
